headline: VRTX's Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates, New Products Aid Sales Growth

headline: Vertex earnings get muted investor response
summary: While overall revenue fell just shy of Wall Street forecasts, sales of the gene editing medicine Casgevy and pain drug Journavx missed analyst estimates by double-digit percentages.
